name: Tuna Swiss Pie
recipeIngredient: -Swiss cheese, grated (1/2 cup for crust and topping)
-Tuna in water, drained and flaked (12 ozs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Prepare a 9-inch pie pan with cooking spray; set aside.
3. To prepare crust, mix spread, garlic powder, and 1 egg white in hot rice.
4. Spoon the rice mixture into the prepared pan and press firmly across the bottom and up the sides of the pan to form a crust.
5. Layer half cup cheese and tuna evenly over the rice crust.
6. Meanwhile, combine milk, remaining egg whites, salt, and black pepper for the filling.
7. Pour the filling over the tuna mixture.
8. Bake for 30 minutes or until the center is set.
9. Top with the remaining cheese and bake for an additional 3 minutes or until the cheese has melted.
